creator: sh0gunk0@gmail.com
text:
hi,
Im trying install FreeBSD on my machine, I have optical drive LG DVD-RAM  GSA-H22N.
and if I select install from CD/DVD, display error:
error mounting /dev/acd0 on /dist: Input/output error(5)

and at Frenzy live cd (based on freebsd 6.1) display cannot find boot device (my drive :( )

also, I've tried to update firmware, set it to primary master, tried it with PIO , without DMA,.... nothing helps
can you help me please ? :)

PS: Im newbie, sorry that I didnt sell output uname -a etc.....

thanks
